title: Scottish Tories win first Westminster by-election in more than 50 years
description: The Tories take Aberdeen South, while the SNP wins in Arbroath and Broughty Ferry.
content:
The Scottish Conservatives have won a Westminster by-election for the first time in more than 50 years, taking Aberdeen South from the SNP.
The seat, vacated by the SNP's Stephen Flynn, was won by Tory MSP Douglas Lumsden.
Shortly afterwards the SNP ... [2564 chars]

title: Scottish Conservatives win Aberdeen South, ousting SNP
description: Tories’ Douglas Lumsden says city has spoken ‘loud and clear’ in support of the North Sea oil and gas industry
content:
The Scottish National party (SNP) has lost the formerly safe seat of Aberdeen South in a shock loss to the Scottish Conservatives.
The Scottish Conservatives’ Douglas Lumsden beat the SNP’s Richard Thomson by 6,050 votes, with a 14.69% swing away fro... [1589 chars]

title: Tay Keith, producer behind Travis Scott's Sicko Mode, found dead
description: The Grammy-nominated Memphis rap producer was behind hits by Eminem, Beyoncé, Drake and Cardi B.
content:
Grammy-nominated music producer Tay Keith, who has worked with hip-hop artists including Drake, Travis Scott, Eminem and Beyoncé, has been found dead in his apartment in Nashville, Tennessee.
Nashville police said the 29-year-old was found dead by of... [1821 chars]

title: The pressure on the Church of England to ditch its slavery reparations plan
description: Will the Church's commitments still be delivered, or do shifting political winds mean there is no longer the will to do so?
content:
The soaring, light-filled quire in Rochester Cathedral has witnessed centuries of worship. But beneath where the cathedral's singers sit, its timeworn paving stones lies a dark financial legacy.

title: BBC pulls new Ashley Cain series after sexist language accusations
